characters.name: "Weird Al" Yankovic
characters.description: Al YankovicGenderMaleFirst AppearanceGeneric Holiday SpecialOther NamesWeird Al[Source]Al Yankovic(more commonly known asWeird Al) was a voice-actor and guest star along withAlice Cooper,Maria MenounosandBret Michaelson "The High Fructose Adventures of Annoying Orange" during the episode "Generic Holiday Special". They were seen trying to spruce up the special episode and review all of the holidays of the year within a full standard episode (11 minutes). So far, he has only playedBruce Dillusand was also a featured guest on "The Marshmallow Show".

characters.name: $500 Popsicle
characters.description: $500 Popsicle is a character who resembles a yellow popsicle who has chocolate at the bottom, and pink sprinkles at the top, and she only appeared inAnnoying Orange: $1 vs $500 Popsicle, and she also is extremely expensive. she fought with$1 Popsicleuntil he fell into the dishwasher, but he came out, and because of the swordfight between her and $1 Popsicle, they both exploded and most likely, both of them died.

characters.name: 1,000 Degree Knife
characters.description: 1,000 Degree KnifeGenderMalePlayed byAaron MasseyFriends999 degree fork(possibly),100,000,000,000 degree spoon(possibly)EnemiesEveryone else (possibly, except for 999 degree fork and 100,000,000,000 spoon)DeathNoneFirst Appearance1000 Degree Knife!Other NamesHottest guy in the Silverware Hood (by 100, 000,000,000 degree spoon)[Source] 1,000 Degree Knifeis the titular main antagonist of theAnnoying Orangeepisode of the same name. He was originally a regularKnifethat was heated up to 1,000 degrees (hence his name). He was locked in the freezer byOrangeto cool down, but was able to cut the freezer fully open. His personality is extremely angry, furious and steamed. Whenever he's angry, his friends calm him down by saying “Darn boy, you hot!”

characters.name: Agent Burrito
characters.description: Agent BurritoGenderMalePlayed byRussell JohnsonDeathCrushed by a frying pan along with Officer TaterFirst AppearanceIncognito Burrito[Source]Agent Burritois a leading protagonist inthe Annoying OrangeepisodeIncognito Burrito. He is sent to the Kitchen to obtainOrange's vuvuzela, in an attempt to prevent him from learning how to use it and therefore severely annoy everyone. Unfortunately for him, he is terrible at being a secret agent, as he is gullible and even erases some of his memories with a neuralyzer. After using his "wealthy businessman" disguise in an attempt to buy the vuvuzela, his gullibility leads him to exchange Orange's vuvuzela fortwovuvuzelas. After taking an aggressive approach with his "escaped convict" disguise, he is promptly apprehended by a police potato. Soon after, Orange learns how to use his vuvuzela upon hearing the word "blow" when Agent Burrito says, "Man, I really blow at being a secret agent". Orange then blows into one of the two vuvuzelas, making such loud noise that it shakes the kitchen and terribly annoysPear,Midget Apple, andGrapefruit, who scream in agony. The rumbling caused by the vuvuzuela's noise causes a frying pan to drop from a shelf and crush both Agent Burrito and Officer Tater. Orange then proceeds to annoy everyone with his vuvuzelas.

characters.name: AI Orange
characters.description: AI OrangeGenderMalePlayed byDane BoedigheimerFriendsOrange,PearDeathExplodedFirst Appearance"Ask Orange #90: AI Orange!!" AI Orangewas the main subject of the Ask Orange episode "Ask Orange #90: AI Orange!!". He was introduced as a robotic version ofOrange, created to answer fan questions. While almost identical in voice, he frequently misunderstood prompts, forcing in awkward puns and off-topic jokes. Orange attempted to fix this by adjusting his algorithm. AI Orange then delivered bizarre greetings, fart jokes, a rap about Roombas, and even wrote an anime titled "Fruit Ninja Farts", where fruits used farts to battle vegetables. He also introduced a character namedSquishy Tomato, a new character who would say "I'm all squish and giggles" before getting interrupted. At the end of the episode, AI Orange was destroyed after his TNT boomerang returned and triggered a full explosion, wiping him out in the blast.

characters.name: Alphabet Soup
characters.description: Alphabet SoupGenderMalePlayed byGreg BensonFriendsOrange(one-sided)EnemiesOrange(one-sided),Pear,Ceiling,Midget Apple(possibly),Marshmallow(possibly),Spelling Bee(possibly)DeathCrushed by faulty roof (revived)First AppearanceSouper Dooper[Source]Alphabet Soupis a character who only appeared inthe Annoying OrangeepisodeSouper Dooper. Soup was being annoyed byOrange, who was pestering him a lot by constantly getting him to create words with his letters, and calling him things he wasn't, such as thoop, moop, an acrobat hoop, halibut poop, and a faulty roof. Orange eventually really annoyed Soup to the point where he began getting extremely angry and began boiling uncontrollably. Towards the end of the episode, he was crushed by fragments of the kitchen's faulty roof. He later appeared in "2 BILLION VIEWS!", thanking the viewers.

characters.name: Ammunition Orange
characters.description: Ammunition OrangeGenderMalePlayed byDane BoedigheimerFriendsOrange,Orange ClonesEnemiesAnalog Orange,KazookaFirst Appearance"Orcrux 3: The Warehouse"[Source]Ammunition Orangeis a minor character who only appeared inthe Annoying Orangeepisodes "Orcrux 3: The Warehouse" and "AMMUNITION ORANGE". He is one of the manyOrange Clonesand is equipped with military gear. He appears during the battle in the warehouse, whenKazooka,Missile Toe, andWhoopee CushionoverpowerGrapefruit. As the situation turns dire, Ammunition Orange arrives with the other clones and immediately takes charge. He declares it's his time to do his thing and successfully shoots down the Kazooka, destroying him and helping to stop theOrcruxes.

characters.name: Analog Orange
characters.description: As his facade, he acts exactly like the Orange we all know and tolerate, albeit his behavior is more unusual than normal. But at his core, Analog Orange is the complete polar opposite compared to Orange. Instead of being a jovial, yet annoying and obnoxious fruit, this orange is purely evil, sadistic, monstrous, heartless, and overall cruel. He has quite the horrific tendencies to him, displaying unnerving qualities. He often says that he controls everything in the kitchen, the knife, and even EVERYTHING in the world. He shown no signs of redemption when he declared he loves being evil and will never stop being evil.

characters.name: Andy the Apple
characters.description: AndyGenderMalePlayed byRobert JenningsDeathDrowned incaramel, eatenFirst AppearanceThe Voodoo You Do![Source] Andy the Appleis one of thevoodoo applesfrom the episodeThe Voodoo You Do!, trying to tortureOrangewith a Voodoo Doll. He had blamedBillwhen part of Orange's mind was transferred to thepin cushion. Andy had then attempted to cover Orange with feathers as ordered by Jack. Bill had stated that they needed to hit him with thecaramelfirst, but Andy claimed there was none to be found at the time. However, all three of the voodoo apples were stabbed by popsicle sticks and dipped in the caramel themselves.

characters.name: Andy the Apple (FOODSPLOSION 1)
characters.description: AndyGenderMalePlayed byRichard RyanDeathCrushed by sledge hammer (revived), crushed again by the same sludge hammerFirst AppearanceFoodsplosion #1[Source] Andy the Applewas the first guest to appear on the show,Foodsplosion.
